title: Close To You
why_this_song: Close To You by Gracie Abrams (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I don't got a single problem with provocative
Close to you, close to you, close to you
(Just let me be) oh, close to you, close to you, close to you
And now your mouth is moving, cinematic timing

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "close" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "close" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "burn" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "burn" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Close To You" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Close To You" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Close To You" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Close To You", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Close To You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Close To You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Close To You" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Close To You" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Close To You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Close To You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.
